pi_items.source: Task instructions and the export evaluation script logic check this exact target path.
Task instructions and the export evaluation script logic check this exact target path.
Calculated via independent test script rendering a Weasis UI MPR panel based on the synthetic 60-slice 256x256 DICOM volume size. A non-empty MPR view naturally exceeds 5 KB.

Derived mathematically from the setup_task.sh Python script. The synthetic volume generates 256x256 slices with 60 depth units, which translates to a 256x166 MPR reconstructed base image. Any exported screenshot will exceed the 100-pixel threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a synthetic 60-slice DICOM CT volume (256x256 resolution per slice) simulating anatomical structures. The expected target files for the coronal and sagittal Multiplanar Reconstruction (MPR) images are /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mpr_coronal.png and /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mpr_sagittal.png, matching the evaluation script targets. The generated DICOM characteristics ensure any valid MPR exported view easily exceeds minimum dimensions of 100x100 pixels and a file size of 5000 bytes.
